name: Greenwood Village
neighborhoodBlurb: Greenwood Village is Eden's home. Our flagship clinic sits on S University Blvd, minutes from Fiddler's Green, the Tech Center, and Cherry Creek State Park. Most of our members live or work within a 10-minute drive.
demographicHook: Home base. Every Eden service — injectables, hormones, peptides, recovery — runs out of this S University Blvd flagship.

name: Centennial
neighborhoodBlurb: Centennial clients are a short drive from Eden Health Club, whether they are coming from SouthGlenn, the Cherry Creek State Park side, or the office corridors near Centennial Airport. Most appointments fit easily before work, after school drop-off, or between errands.
demographicHook: Built for SouthGlenn and South Suburban Park families balancing dual-income schedules — clinical aesthetics and wellness care that fits the school run.

name: Cherry Hills Village
neighborhoodBlurb: Cherry Hills Village sits just west of Eden Health Club, close enough for discreet, efficient appointments without crossing town. Clients often come from the country club corridors, mature residential neighborhoods, and nearby private school routes.
demographicHook: Cherry Hills Village's close-in choice for polished aesthetics and licensed-expert wellness.

name: Denver Tech Center
neighborhoodBlurb: The Denver Tech Center is minutes from Eden Health Club, making lunch-hour and between-meeting appointments practical for professionals working around Belleview, Orchard, and I-25. The clinic is close enough for efficient care without turning a workday into a commute.
demographicHook: Discreet lunch-hour care for Tech Center professionals — injectables, hormone optimization, or recovery infusions without a long break from the desk.

name: Englewood
neighborhoodBlurb: Englewood clients reach Eden Health Club quickly from the hospital district, older residential neighborhoods, and the South Broadway corridor. The clinic is close enough for practical appointments without needing to drive into central Denver.
demographicHook: Englewood's nearby destination for licensed-expert aesthetics, hormone care, and recovery.

name: Lone Tree
neighborhoodBlurb: Lone Tree clients are a straight shot from Park Meadows, RidgeGate, and the Sky Ridge corridor to Eden Health Club. The drive is short enough for injectables, IV therapy, or follow-up visits between work, errands, and family schedules.
demographicHook: Lone Tree's south metro option for polished aesthetics and performance-minded wellness.

name: Highlands Ranch
neighborhoodBlurb: Highlands Ranch has long been part of Eden Health Club's south metro referral base. Clients come from the Town Center, established neighborhoods, and family-heavy corridors for care that fits around busy household schedules.
demographicHook: Town Center families and Shea Stadium loop residents come to Eden for steady aesthetic, hormone, and recovery care closer to home.

name: Littleton
neighborhoodBlurb: Littleton clients reach Eden Health Club easily from historic Main Street, Aspen Grove, and the established neighborhoods west of University. The route keeps high-quality aesthetics and wellness care close to home without a downtown trip.
demographicHook: Historic Main Street or newer Hudson Gardens and Aspen Grove subdivisions — both routes land at the south side's full-service wellness club.

name: Parker
neighborhoodBlurb: Parker clients often choose Eden Health Club for the clinical depth of a south metro wellness club without the feel of a quick storefront appointment. The E-470 and Arapahoe Road routes make the drive manageable for planned care.
demographicHook: E-470 makes Eden a practical destination for Parker families and Mainstreet-district professionals who want clinical depth over a quick storefront aesthetics stop.

name: Denver
neighborhoodBlurb: Eden Health Club serves Denver clients who orbit the south side of the city, especially Wash Park, Cherry Creek, University, and nearby central neighborhoods. The Greenwood Village location keeps advanced aesthetics and wellness care accessible without crossing the entire metro.
demographicHook: South Denver's destination for licensed experts, advanced credentials, and unmatched care.

name: Castle Rock
neighborhoodBlurb: Castle Rock clients make the drive to Eden Health Club for a deeper clinical menu than a single-service aesthetics stop. The I-25 corridor keeps Greenwood Village reachable for planned injectables, hormone care, recovery, and skin treatments.
demographicHook: Castle Rock's south metro choice for elevated aesthetics and performance-focused wellness.

name: South Aurora
neighborhoodBlurb: South Aurora clients come from the Southlands corridor, 80016 neighborhoods, and the Buckley area for care that is close enough to plan around work and family life. Eden Health Club is positioned well for the southeast side without a downtown commute.
demographicHook: Serving the Southlands corridor, 80016 households, and Buckley-adjacent professionals who want a clinical wellness home without driving into central Denver.
